description_long: This is a classic full-size van with a boxy, utilitarian shape and a two-tone paint job featuring a maroon upper section and white lower body with horizontal striping. The van has large rectangular windows along both sides, a prominent front grille with horizontal slats, and dual side mirrors. The roof is slightly raised, possibly indicating a conversion for extra headroom, and there is a spare tire mounted on the rear door. The wheels are standard steel rims with visible hubcaps, and the van features multiple doors including a sliding side door and double rear doors. The overall appearance suggests a late 1980s to early 1990s American conversion van, commonly used for family or recreational purposes.
description: A two-tone maroon and white full-size van with large side windows, a raised roof, and a rear-mounted spare tire, typical of late 20th-century American conversion vans.
description_view_0: Side view showing the maroon and white color scheme, three large side windows, and the sliding side door.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the wide grille, rectangular headlights, and the slightly raised roof.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with similar window and door configuration, and clear view of the spare tire at the rear.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the double rear doors, spare tire mount, and rear window.
attribute_door_configuration: two front doors, one sliding side door, two rear doors
